revision.comment: Moving [[:Category:Wikipedia variable-like templates]] to [[:Category:Wikipedia magic word templates]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2021 September 11#Category:Wikipedia variable-like templates]]
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{#invoke:String|find|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|/sandbox%d*$|plain=false}}|0|{{{{#if:{{{1|}}}||FULL}}BASEPAGENAME}}|{{{{#if:{{{1|}}}||FULL}}PAGENAME}}}} {{Documentation|content= This template returns the current {{Tlx|FULLBASEPAGENAME}}, unless the title ends in /sandbox plus any number of digits, in which case it returns the {{tlx|FULLPAGENAME}}. It is primarily meant for demonstrating the sandbox version of templates in their documentation. This template takes one numbered parameter (1); if anything is in this parameter then it will return {{BASEPAGENAME}} and {{PAGENAME}}, which have no namespace prefix. }} [[Category:Wikipedia magic word templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{#invoke:String|find|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|/sandbox%d*$|plain=false}}|0|{{{{#if:{{{1|}}}||FULL}}BASEPAGENAME}}|{{{{#if:{{{1|}}}||FULL}}PAGENAME}}}} {{Documentation|content= This template returns the current {{Tlx|FULLBASEPAGENAME}}, unless the title ends in /sandbox plus any number of digits, in which case it returns the {{tlx|FULLPAGENAME}}. It is primarily meant for demonstrating the sandbox version of templates in their documentation. This template takes one numbered parameter (1); if anything is in this parameter then it will return {{BASEPAGENAME}} and {{PAGENAME}}, which have no namespace prefix. }} [[Category:Wikipedia magic word templates]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{#invoke:String|find|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|/sandbox%d*$|plain=false}}|0|{{{{#if:{{{1|}}}||FULL}}BASEPAGENAME}}|{{{{#if:{{{1|}}}||FULL}}PAGENAME}}}} {{Documentation|content= This template returns the current {{Tlx|FULLBASEPAGENAME}}, unless the title ends in /sandbox plus any number of digits, in which case it returns the {{tlx|FULLPAGENAME}}. It is primarily meant for demonstrating the sandbox version of templates in their documentation. This template takes one numbered parameter (1); if anything is in this parameter then it will return {{BASEPAGENAME}} and {{PAGENAME}}, which have no namespace prefix. }} [[Category:Wikipedia magic word templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{#invoke:String|find|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|/sandbox%d*$|plain=false}}|0|{{{{#if:{{{1|}}}||FULL}}BASEPAGENAME}}|{{{{#if:{{{1|}}}||FULL}}PAGENAME}}}} {{Documentation|content= This template returns the current {{Tlx|FULLBASEPAGENAME}}, unless the title ends in /sandbox plus any number of digits, in which case it returns the {{tlx|FULLPAGENAME}}. It is primarily meant for demonstrating the sandbox version of templates in their documentation. This template takes one numbered parameter (1); if anything is in this parameter then it will return {{BASEPAGENAME}} and {{PAGENAME}}, which have no namespace prefix. }} [[Category:Wikipedia magic word templates]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{#invoke:String|find|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|/sandbox%d*$|plain=false}}|0|{{{{#if:{{{1|}}}||FULL}}BASEPAGENAME}}|{{{{#if:{{{1|}}}||FULL}}PAGENAME}}}} {{Documentation|content= This template returns the current {{Tlx|FULLBASEPAGENAME}}, unless the title ends in /sandbox plus any number of digits, in which case it returns the {{tlx|FULLPAGENAME}}. It is primarily meant for demonstrating the sandbox version of templates in their documentation. This template takes one numbered parameter (1); if anything is in this parameter then it will return {{BASEPAGENAME}} and {{PAGENAME}}, which have no namespace prefix. }} [[Category:Wikipedia magic word templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
